title: Realism Reimagined [discontinued]
description: This Modpack focuses on almost all aspects of the game and makes it more realistic. I have been working on this Modpack for a very long time to improve it and make it as realistic as possible.
body: This modpack has many Vinila + features and Beautiful world generation. It also features 2 shaders Photon for low end PC's and the other ones  for high end PC's. It also has really smooth FPS depending on what shader you use. You may have a few lag spikes.
